title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) Economic Prospect Score
description: A forward-looking economic prospect analysis of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM), scoring competitive momentum, moat durability, and sentiment signals.
verdictDetail: JPMorgan is the best-run bank in the world — fortress balance sheet, #1 investment bank, dominant consumer franchise. The $15B+/yr tech investment creates competitive separation. The risk is cyclical: credit losses in recession and NII normalizing. But if you own one bank, this is the one.
keyRisks: Credit cycle deterioration — consumer delinquencies rising, recession would increase loan loss provisions
Net interest income declining as Fed potentially cuts rates
Jamie Dimon's eventual retirement creating succession uncertainty
keyCatalysts: Market share gains from regional banks struggling with CRE exposure
JPMorgan Payments and embedded finance growing to $10B+ revenue
Investment banking fee recovery as M&A and IPO activity normalizes
methodology: Score is based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30), totaling 0-100.
